title: LIFT The MOUTH CORNERS: Non-Surgical Treatments for a Youthful Smile
excerpt: As we age, one of the most common concerns is the appearance of sagging mouth corners, which can make us look sad or angry even if we...
body_text:
As we age, one of the most common concerns is the appearance of sagging mouth corners, which can make us look sad or angry even if we don't feel that way. Fortunately, there are non-surgical treatments available to lift the mouth corners and restore a youthful smile. In this article, we will discuss the causes of sagging mouth corners, the benefits of non-surgical treatments, and where to find expert practitioners.


Causes of Sagging Mouth Corners
There are several factors that contribute to the appearance of sagging mouth corners, including:

- Volume loss in the cheeks and lips 
- Loss of elasticity in the skin
- Muscle atrophy around the mouth
- Gravity pulling down on the skin

These factors can lead to a downturned mouth that can make us look older and less vibrant.

Non-Surgical Treatments for Sagging Mouth Corners
Fortunately, there are several non-surgical treatments available to lift the mouth corners and restore a youthful smile. These include:

Dermal Fillers

Dermal fillers are a popular treatment for lifting the mouth corners, as they can add volume to the cheeks and lips, which can help lift the surrounding skin. This can help to reduce the appearance of sagging mouth corners and restore a more youthful look. 

Botox Injections

Botox injections can also be used to lift the mouth corners by relaxing the muscles that pull the corners of the mouth down. This can help to create a more uplifted, youthful appearance. Results typically last 3-5 months, and the treatment is quick and almost painless.

Combination Treatment

For the best results, many patients choose to combine dermal fillers and Botox injections to lift the mouth corners and address volume loss and wrinkles. This non-surgical alternative to a traditional facelift can produce excellent, natural-looking results that last 9-18 months.



Conclusion
If you're looking for a non-surgical solution to sagging mouth corners and a more youthful smile, Carisma Aesthetics can help. Our expert practitioners can work with you to develop a customized treatment plan that addresses your concerns and helps you achieve your desired results. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn more about our range of anti-aging treatments.
